- Backlog Item ID: BI-260021
- Title: Preserve pre-search recommended label visibility
- Persona/Actor: Data manager and domain operator
- Value statement: For workspace users, keep recommended labels visible before search so first action discovery remains guided in a blank-first workspace.
- Context: After adopting blank-first entry, users still need lightweight guidance on how to start search without requiring a freeform first query.
- Problem statement: If no suggestions are visible before search, users may face a blank workspace with unclear next action and slower initial discovery.
- Expected outcome: Users see recommended labels near the search bar on first entry and can use them as immediate search affordances.
- Success metric(s):
  - Recommendation visibility is codified in requirement and backlog traceability.
  - Blank-first entry and pre-search guidance coexist without contradiction.
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - REQ-FR-260023 is created and linked.
  - Product backlog and backlog status include BI-260021 with traceability.
  - Governance scope for recommendation source and scale remains explicitly open for separate decisions.
- Non-goals: Selecting recommendation source, ranking algorithm, cap limits, and autocomplete behavior.
- Constraints: Preserve blank-first entry model and avoid introducing implicit preload behavior.
- Dependencies: REQ-FR-260022 (blank-first entry), ADR-260016 search/discoverability baseline.
- Risks/assumptions:
  - Risk: visible recommendations may become noisy at scale without later cap/ranking decisions.
  - Assumption: some upfront guidance is preferable to zero guidance in blank-first entry.
- Validation approach: Requirement/index traceability checks now; implementation checks in later slices.
- Implementation scope (when item moves to In Progress):
  - In-scope modules/files: `workspace-search`, `ui-shell`, related UI tests.
  - Out-of-scope guardrails: recommendation source contracts and scale constraints.
- Evidence requirements for Done:
  - Requirement-to-evidence mapping: REQ-FR-260023 -> UI/E2E evidence for pre-search visibility.
  - Quality gates: `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run test`, `npm run test:e2e` as applicable.
  - Regression checks: blank-first entry remains intact.
  - Risk and rollback notes: remove/adjust pre-search suggestions only via subsequent decision records.
- Priority score: 92
- Target window: Near-term search UX stabilization
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: REQ-FR-260023.md, REQ-FR-260022.md
  - ADR: ADR-260016.md
  - ICR: n/a
  - Changeset: n/a
